about_meta_description: YuKoLi (Foshan YuKoLi Technology Co., Ltd.) — 20-year commercial kitchen equipment manufacturer based in Foshan, Guangdong. 114 smart kitchen equipment models, serving 50+ countries, CE/UL/ISO 9001 certified.

about_hero_desc: YuKoLi (Foshan YuKoLi Technology Co., Ltd.) is rooted in Foshan, Guangdong — China's kitchen equipment manufacturing hub. With 20 years of expertise, we've grown from a single wok machine to 114 smart kitchen equipment models, helping commercial kitchens in 50+ countries cut labor costs and standardize output.
about_mfg_adv1_desc: CNC machining centers and automated production lines ensure consistent precision for every component
about_mfg_adv2_desc: Multi-stage quality control with strict performance and safety testing before shipment
about_mfg_adv3_desc: Strategic partnerships with global component suppliers ensure supply chain stability
about_mfg_adv4_desc: Efficient international logistics delivering equipment safely to 50+ countries
about_mfg_desc: YuKoLi's Foshan manufacturing base is equipped with advanced CNC machining centers, automated welding systems, and comprehensive quality inspection lines. Every unit undergoes rigorous performance and safety testing before shipment, ensuring reliable operation in demanding commercial kitchen environments.
about_story_p1: Founded in 2006 in Foshan, Guangdong — China's heartland of kitchen equipment manufacturing — YuKoLi started with a clear mission: to transform commercial kitchens through smart automation. After 20 years of continuous innovation, we have grown into an integrated R&D, manufacturing, and sales enterprise specializing in intelligent kitchen equipment.
about_story_p2: Today, our 114 smart equipment models serve 50+ countries worldwide — from chain restaurants in Bangkok, Thailand, to central kitchens in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam; from corporate canteens in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, to fast food brands in Jakarta, Indonesia. Whether you run a street food stall or a thousand-store chain, YuKoLi helps you save labor, standardize quality, and scale efficiently.

sol_case_1_desc: After deploying YuKoLi smart cooking robots, daily output per store tripled from 200 to 600 meals, labor costs dropped 65%, and dish consistency reached 99.5%.
sol_case_2_desc: Providing standardized Chinese meals across 32 international schools with YuKoLi cooking lines for centralized prep and distributed serving — catering efficiency tripled.
sol_case_3_desc: Deployed YuKoLi fully automated cooking systems across 120 hot pot outlets. Soup base preparation and ingredient prep are now fully automated, reducing back-of-house staff from 8 to 3.
